intent: Compile the active browser surface from programmable matter fragments.

steps.label: Query Matter
steps.description: Load roots, sources, discoveries, and specialist definitions into a typed fragment pool.

steps.label: Compose Candidates
steps.description: Generate multiple candidate surfaces with different strategic emphases.

steps.label: Evaluate
steps.description: Score candidates on locality, diversity, substrate coverage, swarm coverage, and runtime awareness.

steps.label: Promote
steps.description: Write the winning surface to active runtime files and append a render receipt.
